name: Miku & Teto Border
description: Adds a Miku & Teto border to every level!

sprite-size.name: Sprite Size
sprite-size.description: Base size of the border sprites.

hype-strength.name: Hype Strength (%)
hype-strength.description: Multiplier for rotational speed and pulse scale.

show-top.name: Show Top Border
show-top.description: Whether to display sprites on the top edge of the screen.

render-behind-hud.name: Render Behind HUD
render-behind-hud.description: Whether the sprites should render behind or on top of the UI elements.
